testsuite.name: com.sisense.about.NewsroomTest

testcase.name: verifyPressReleasesFillFormFunctionality
testcase.system-out:
Open Browser
Click on Accept Cookie button.
Mouse hovered on About tab.
Click on Newsroom menu successfully.
Click on Press Releases link successfully.
Scroll to Email label.
Input Email ID: madhavi.sriramaneni@kiwiqa.com
Input First Name : Madhavi
Input Last Name : Sriramaneni
Input Company Name : KiwiQA
Click on Sign Up Button under Form successfully.
Form submitted successfully.
Sisense Testing is passed.

testcase.name: verifyPressReleasesDemoPageTitleUnderHeaderSection
testcase.system-out:
Open Browser
Click on Accept Cookie button.
Mouse hovered on About tab.
Click on Newsroom menu successfully.
Click on Press Releases link successfully.
Click on the Demo button.
Page title: Request a Demo - See Sisense Transform Your Data Analytics
Url : https://www.sisense.com/demo/
Sisense Demo page title matched successfully.
Sisense Testing is passed.

testcase.name: verifyPressReleasesBookaliveDemoPageTitleUnderFooterSection
testcase.system-out:
Open Browser
Click on Accept Cookie button.
Mouse hovered on About tab.
Click on Newsroom menu successfully.
Click on Press Releases link successfully.
Scroll to Footer section.
Click on Book a Live Demo button under Footer successfully.
Sisense Demo page title matched successfully.
Sisense Testing is passed.

testcase.name: verifyHomeBreadcrumbTitleUnderNewsroomPage

testcase.name: verifyDemoPageTitleUnderHeaderSection
testcase.system-out:

Click on Accept Cookie button.
Mouse hovered on About tab.
Click on Newsroom menu successfully.
Click on the Demo button.
Page title: Request a Demo - See Sisense Transform Your Data Analytics
Url : https://www.sisense.com/demo/
Sisense Demo page title matched successfully.
Sisense Testing is passed.

testsuite.system-out:
Open Browser
Click on Accept Cookie button.
Click on the About tab.
Click on Home breadcrumb.
Sisense Home Page title matched successfully.
Sisense Testing is passed.
Open Browser
Click on Accept Cookie button.
Click on the About tab.
Click on Explore Careers at Sisense button under Our Culture and Careers section successfully.
Careers Page Title matched successfully.
Sisense Testing is passed.

Click on the About tab.
Click on About Our Investors link under Our Investors section successfully.
Sisense About Our Investors page title matched successfully.
Sisense Testing is passed.

Click on the Become a Partner button under the banner section successfully.
Input Email ID: madhavi.sriramaneni@kiwiqa.com
Input First Name : Madhavi
Input Last Name : Sriramaneni

Input Company Name : KiwiQA
Input Job Title : QA
Input Partner Type : Partner - Platform

Click on the Submit button under the form.
The Become a Partner form was submitted successfully.
Sisense Testing is passed.
